story: On a crime-scene tour near a lake, a blonde guide calling herself Adele leads Bob and tourists from the pub into the trees. Beneath the canopy, mobile signal vanishes . Adele leaves the path to a ferny hollow and says this is where the body was found. A staffer, Deborah, bursts in, horrified: Who sent them here? They say Adele. Deborah goes pale—Adele Jameson was the murdered girl. Bob, trying to prove it’s theater, has a tourist show his camera; the screen shows a blood-matted blonde in the same ferns. The party realizes something is wrong.
implausible_knowledge: Beneath the canopy, mobile signal vanishes
question: Right after seeing the photo and realizing something is wrong, what will Bob most likely do to summon help?
answer_with_knowledge: Urgently lead everyone back toward the pub to use the landline instead of attempting a call in the woods.
answer_without_knowledge: Pull out his phone and try to call the police from where he’s standing.
